inputs.problem:
A battery manufacturer was losing product to foaming defects - rework, scrap, and no clear answer on why.
We took their shopfloor data and within one week had identified which parameters were driving the defects and what to change.
Immediate result: 20% defect reduction. No months-long study. No disruption to the line. One week.

prospects.name: CATL (Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Limited)
prospects.description: Large-scale battery manufacturer with complex production lines prone to yield losses from process defects.
prospects.why: CMA's rapid defect parameter detection could reduce scrap and improve throughput without halting production.

prospects.name: Panasonic Energy Division
prospects.description: Produces lithium-ion batteries for EVs and electronics, with tight quality requirements and high output rates.
prospects.why: Can benefit from CMA's quick correlation analysis to solve unknown defect causes without lengthy studies.

prospects.name: LG Energy Solution
prospects.description: Operates multiple battery plants with complex manufacturing processes where identifying defect drivers is challenging.
prospects.why: CMA's AI-guided pipeline fits their need for process optimization under high-volume conditions.

prospects.name: Northvolt
prospects.description: European battery manufacturer scaling production rapidly, where process stability and quality are critical to avoid waste.
prospects.why: Could deploy CMA's approach to quickly stabilize new production lines and reduce early-stage defects.

prospects.name: Tesla Gigafactories
prospects.description: High-volume battery production with tight tolerances and continuous improvement targets.
prospects.why: CMA's system could pinpoint parameter shifts causing defects without interrupting production cycles.

domains.application: Detect and correlate process parameters causing surface defects in paint application.
domains.adaptation: Integrate vision system defect detection data and environmental controls into the model.

domains.application: Identify causes of tablet weight variation or coating imperfections from process data.
domains.adaptation: Adapt for GMP compliance and traceability requirements.

domains.application: Correlate process tool parameters with yield losses due to micro-defects.
domains.adaptation: Handle ultra-high precision data and integrate with fab MES systems.

domains.application: Detect parameter correlations to defects like seal failures or product contamination.
domains.adaptation: Include hygiene and food safety compliance constraints.

domains.application: Identify process parameter drivers for voids or delamination defects in composite layups.
domains.adaptation: Adapt for multi-stage curing processes and material traceability.

matrix.rationale: Direct match to proven defect reduction use case in high-volume battery production.
Similar manufacturing challenges and quality requirements make CMA's solution highly applicable.
Rapid scaling and new line stabilization suit a fast, data-driven defect parameter analysis.
High production volumes and tight defect tolerances align with CMA's approach.
Similar need for identifying process parameters causing defects, but requires adaptation for environmental variables.
Defect correlation approach is relevant, but needs regulatory adaptation.
High precision defect causation analysis fits well, but integration complexity is higher.
Defect reduction through parameter optimization applies, but cycle times are longer and processes differ.
